description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a ring of mature, leafy trees, creating a sense of privacy and enclosure. The house features a prominent hip roof and a symmetrical facade with a covered front porch supported by columns. Large rectangular windows are arranged in a balanced pattern on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The entryway is centrally located and slightly recessed, with steps leading up to the porch. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a smooth material, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the roof is clad in traditional shingles. The surrounding trees are evenly spaced, forming a natural barrier and enhancing the residential, neighborhood feel.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch, surrounded by a ring of mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement, framed by trees.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the hip roof and the full ring of trees encircling the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with trees partially obscuring the back of the house, showing the roof and some rear windows.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear facade and the dense arrangement of trees behind the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a single main door
